understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` by navigating the grid, avoiding spikes, and using clicks to remove breakable blocks that block paths.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement uses MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT for horizontal shifts, followed by automatic gravity-driven falling until landing on a solid tile, hazard, or goal. CLICK with target_position removes breakable blocks (x). Spikes (u/v) cause instant failure if landed on. UNDO reverts the prior action. Each level allows 2 attempts with 50 turns max; falling into spikes or exhausting turns ends the attempt.
